title: Oru Chiri Iru Chiri Bumper Chiri
subTitle: Skilled participants take the stage to perform a series of hilarious skits to entertain the audience and the judges to win prizes.

title: Othiri Othiri Swapnangal
subTitle: Varsha, an ambitious young woman, strives to overcome personal struggles and societal stigma while Shivananda, a fearless journalist, fights against corruption and deep family secrets.

title: Archana Chechi L L B
subTitle: Archana, a lawyer, acts as guardian to her three younger brothers in their village joint family. Having sacrificed her marriage for them, life takes a turn when her ex-husband remarries.

title: Darmmayodhavu Garudan
subTitle: Garuda inherits immense strength from his divine parents but must serve his cruel step-mother. Soon, he struggles against the snakes to release his mother from her heavy chains of servitude.

title: Super Kanmani
subTitle: Rejected by most of her family and community since infancy due to a birth defect, Kanmani aspires to become a fashion designer and support her father.

title: Ottashikharam
subTitle: A childless couple finds a surrogate woman in order to fulfil their dreams of parenthood. However, complexities brew when the question of who will have the child arises.
